title: chenopodium graveolens f. pumilum
intro: Chenopodium graveolens f. pumilum, a subspecies of the Chenopodium graveolens plant, is a small, bushy perennial herb that belongs to the amaranth family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Chenopodium graveolens f. pumilum include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The herb can be prepared through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies and traditional medicine.
